category_sources: Official xterm page describes xterm terminal features and FAQ/change-log documentation.
source_facts.description: Terminal emulator for the X Window System.
display_name_sources: Official invisible-island xterm page uses XTerm/xterm as the project name.
docs_sources: Official xterm project page links FAQ, change log, source, archives, and related documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official xterm project site.
repo_sources: Official xterm page links ThomasDickey/xterm-snapshots as an archive of snapshots exported by the maintainer; it is source control but described as snapshots rather than the primary development system.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was determined.
tags_sources: Official xterm page discusses terminal descriptions, XTerm FAQ, and xterm-specific terminal behavior.
source_facts.description identifies an X Window System terminal emulator.
